display.purpose: Page titles only. One per screen.

body.purpose: All prose, table data, form content. Max 65-75ch.

mono.purpose: Invoice numbers, ID cards, meter readings.

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Default card/panel shadow. Most common in the system.

shadows.name: ambient-medium
shadows.purpose: Hover lift on cards, dropdowns, popovers.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button. Used once per visible context as the primary CTA.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">เพิ่มผู้เช่า</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.420 0.120 255); color: #fff; font-family: Inter, Kanit, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.340 0.120 255); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.08), 0 2px 4px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.04); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: oklch(0.300 0.110 255); transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.420 0.120 255 / 0.25); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action. Cancel, dismiss, or non-primary alternative.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: oklch(0.960 0.005 250); color: oklch(0.180 0.015 250); font-family: Inter, Kanit, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 20px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.900 0.008 250); border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: oklch(0.700 0.008 250); background: oklch(0.940 0.005 250); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.420 0.120 255 / 0.25); }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive action. Delete confirmations only — never inline.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: oklch(0.500 0.200 25); color: #fff; font-family: Inter, Kanit, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: oklch(0.430 0.200 25); } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.500 0.200 25 / 0.25); }

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-label { font-family: Inter, Kanit, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.420 0.012 250); letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .ds-input { font-family: Inter, Kanit, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.180 0.015 250); background: #fff; border: 1px solid oklch(0.900 0.008 250); border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px 14px; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.550 0.010 250); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.420 0.120 255); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.420 0.120 255 / 0.25); }

components.name: Status Badge - Paid
components.description: Paid status indicator on invoices and payments.
components.html: ชำระแล้ว
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, Kanit, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-badge--success { background: oklch(0.500 0.140 155 / 0.12); color: oklch(0.400 0.130 155); }

components.name: Status Badge - Pending
components.html: รอชำระ

components.name: Card Container
components.description: Standard content container with ambient shadow.
components.html:
ห้อง A101

2 ห้องนอน, 1 ห้องน้ำ
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 14px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.06), 0 1px 2px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.04); transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 12px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.08), 0 2px 4px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.04); } .ds-card-title { font-family: Kanit, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.180 0.015 250); margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-body { font-family: Inter, Kanit, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.550 0.010 250); margin: 0; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation link. Active state uses cobalt highlight.
components.html: ห้องพัก
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 10px; font-family: Inter, Kanit, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.550 0.010 250); text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(1 0 0 / 0.05); color: oklch(0.800 0.005 250); } .ds-nav-item--active { background: oklch(0.420 0.120 255 / 0.15); color: #fff; }

narrative.overview:
A well-organized personal notebook: clean pages, clear numbers, the satisfaction of everything accounted for. RMS Manager is a tool that disappears into the task. The design earns trust through clarity, not ornamentation — every pixel serves the landlord's need to see what's happening across their properties at a glance.

The system is restrained by default. A single cobalt blue accent handles primary actions and current state; everything else is tonal neutrals. The interface feels airy and lifted — soft ambient shadows give panels a gentle sense of separation without heaviness. Components are tactile and confident: buttons feel solid when you press them, inputs feel grounded when you type, controls respond clearly to every action.

This system explicitly rejects: overly complex enterprise tools (SAP-style density), generic bland SaaS gray aesthetics, and dark-mode developer-facing tool styling. It also rejects decorative motion, gradient text, glassmorphism, and any visual complexity that doesn't serve the task.
keyCharacteristics: Clean pages, clear numbers. Data density is comfortable, not cramped. White space is structural, not decorative.
One accent, used with intent. Cobalt blue marks the active thing, the primary action, the current state — nothing else.
Ambient lift. Cards and panels float gently above the surface. Depth is subtle and consistent.
Thai-first typography. Kanit leads for headings and navigation; Inter supports body text and data.
State-complete components. Every interactive element ships with default, hover, focus, active, disabled, loading, and error states.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Ledger Cobalt is the only saturated color on routine screens. Amber Signal and semantic colors appear only in response to state. If a screen uses more than two saturated colors simultaneously, the hierarchy has collapsed.

rules.name: The No-Tint-Background Rule
rules.body: The page background is pure white. Warmth and brand feeling come from the cobalt accent and the Kanit typeface. Adding cream, sand, or warm tints is forbidden.

rules.name: The Fixed Scale Rule
rules.body: No fluid typography (clamp()). Product UI is viewed at consistent DPI. Fixed rem values at each step.

rules.name: The Kanit-for-Structure Rule
rules.body: Kanit sets the tone; Inter does the work. Headings get Kanit. Everything else gets Inter.

rules.name: The Lift-on-Interact Rule
rules.body: Cards at rest use Ambient Low. On hover, they transition to Ambient Medium over 150ms. Shadows are feedback, not decoration.

dos: Do use Ledger Cobalt exclusively for primary actions and active state. One blue per screen.
Do use white text on all saturated color fills.
Do provide all interactive states: default, hover, focus-visible, active, disabled, loading, error.
Do use skeleton loading states for content areas.
Do write empty states that teach, not just 'ไม่พบข้อมูล.'
Do maintain consistent spacing: 24px card padding, 16px element gaps, 32px page margins.
Do test Thai text at every weight used.
Do use prefers-reduced-motion: reduce for every animation.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient). Absolute ban.
Don't use glassmorphism or blur effects decoratively.
Don't use cream, sand, beige, or warm-tinted backgrounds.
Don't mix inline styles and Tailwind classes on the same element.
Don't add border-left or border-right > 1px as colored accent stripes.
Don't use uppercase text transforms on Thai text.
Don't use decorative motion that doesn't convey state change.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing curves.
Don't build overly complex enterprise-style interfaces.
